name: nyx-local-ai
description: A local-first AI coding agent sidebar. Auto-detects Ollama & LM Studio models. No account, no cloud.

commands.title: Move Nyx to the Right Side Bar

nyx.ollamaUrl.description: Base URL of your Ollama server.

nyx.lmStudioUrl.description: Base URL of your LM Studio server.

nyx.customEndpoints.description: Legacy: additional OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Prefer the in-sidebar 'Manage models' UI (nyx.machines).

name.description: Label shown next to the model, e.g. '2x DGX Spark'.

nyx.machines.description: Machines (labeled endpoints) that serve models. Managed via the Nyx 'Manage models' screen in the sidebar.

name.description: Display name, e.g. '2x DGX Spark Cluster'.

url.description: Host or base URL, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:11434.

apiKey.description: Deprecated: keys entered here are migrated into the editor's secret storage on first use.

nyx.autonomy.description: How much the agent may do without asking: 'safe' (network access asks too), 'balanced' (reads free, mutations ask), 'autopilot' (edits/commands run through; deleting files still asks). Per-tool nyx.toolPermissions overrides always win.

nyx.toolPermissions.description: Per-tool permissions: map a tool name (read_file, list_dir, search_files, find_files, get_diagnostics, fetch_url, web_search, write_file, edit_file, delete_file, rename_file, run_command, run_script, …) to 'allow', 'ask' or 'deny'. Use 'mcp:<server>' for an MCP server and '*' as a fallback. Defaults: reads/search allowed; edits, run_command and run_script ask.

nyx.maxAgentSteps.description: Maximum number of tool iterations the agent may take per task. A Continue button appears when the limit is reached.

nyx.toolProfile.description: Which tool set to offer the model. 'reduced' exposes only the core tools (better for ~7B models); 'auto' picks based on the model size in its name.

nyx.browserExecutable.description: Path to a Chromium-based browser binary for the browser_* tools. Empty = auto-detect installed Chrome/Edge.

nyx.autocompleteEnabled.description: Tab autocomplete via fill-in-the-middle on a small local model (opt-in; keeps a model warm on your GPU).

nyx.autocompleteModel.description: FIM-capable Ollama model for tab autocomplete (qwen2.5-coder, codellama, starcoder2, codegemma…).

nyx.autocompleteOllamaUrl.description: Override: Ollama host for autocomplete only. Empty = use nyx.helperOllamaUrl / nyx.ollamaUrl.

nyx.helperOllamaUrl.description: Shared host for helper workloads (vision, embeddings, autocomplete). Empty = use nyx.ollamaUrl. The per-feature URL settings override this when set explicitly.

nyx.semanticIndexEnabled.description: Enable the local semantic code index (embeddings via a local Ollama model) powering the semantic_search tool.

nyx.embeddingModel.description: Local embedding model for the semantic index (pulled automatically via Ollama on first use).

nyx.embeddingOllamaUrl.description: Override: host that serves the embedding model (Ollama /api/embed or OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings). When left at the default, nyx.helperOllamaUrl / nyx.ollamaUrl is used.

nyx.indexMaxFiles.description: Maximum number of files the semantic index covers. A status warning appears when the limit is hit.

nyx.indexMaxChunks.description: Maximum number of embedded chunks kept in the semantic index. A status warning appears when the limit is hit.

nyx.mcpEnabled.description: Connect to MCP servers from ~/.cursor/mcp.json, .cursor/mcp.json and nyx.mcpServers, and offer their tools to the agent.

nyx.mcpServers.description: Additional MCP servers (same shape as Cursor's mcp.json): { "name": { "command": "...", "args": [], "env": {} } } or { "name": { "url": "http://..." } }.

nyx.updateCheck.description: Check GitHub releases once a day and offer one-click updates (single anonymous API call; no telemetry).

nyx.utilityModel.description: Model for utility work (chat titles, commit messages; when set explicitly, context compaction too). Empty = auto-pick the smallest reachable ≤8B model; falls back to the active model.

nyx.grindMaxIterations.description: Max fix-and-retest iterations for the /grind fix-until-green loop (also caps batch verification).

nyx.batchVerifyCommand.description: Shell command run after every job of a batch queue run (e.g. "npm test"); failures are fed back fix-until-green. Empty = no verification.

nyx.benchmarkRouting.description: Opt-in multi-model routing based on stored benchmark scores: the judgment-best model handles the plan/reasoning turn, the edit-precision winner executes. Needs at least two benchmarked models.

nyx.includeActiveFile.description: Automatically include the active editor file (path + ±30 lines around the cursor) as lightweight context with each message.

nyx.repoMap.description: Inject a compact workspace map (directories and their files, ~400 tokens) into the agent's system context so models stop guessing where files live.

nyx.keepAlive.description: Keep the model loaded on Ollama after each turn (warm KV cache, no reload between turns). Ollama duration format, e.g. '30m', '2h', '-1' (forever); empty disables.

nyx.accentColor.description: Brand accent color of the Nyx panel (any CSS color, e.g. '#b180d7'). Empty uses the theme's focus color. Helps telling Nyx apart from Cursor's own agent panel.

nyx.systemPromptAppend.description: Extra instructions appended to the agent's system prompt (kept stable per session for prompt-cache efficiency). For project-specific rules prefer .cursor/rules/*.mdc.

nyx.maxOutputTokens.description: Hard cap per generation (max_tokens). Prevents runaway outputs from freezing the editor; set 0 to disable.

nyx.allowPrivateNetworkFetch.description: Allow the fetch_url tool to reach localhost / private-network addresses (SSRF guard is on by default).

nyx.contextTokens.description: Assumed context window (in tokens) when a machine has no context length set. Used to trigger automatic compaction.

nyx.compactThreshold.description: Fraction of the context budget that triggers automatic compaction of older turns.

nyx.visionModel.description: Local vision model used to describe images for non-vision agents. Auto-pulled via Ollama on first use. Smallest reliable option is 'moondream'; for the tiniest footprint try an 'hf.co/…-GGUF' model.

nyx.visionOllamaUrl.description: Override: Ollama host that runs (and, if needed, downloads) the vision model. When left at the default, nyx.helperOllamaUrl / nyx.ollamaUrl is used.

nyx.autoInstallVisionModel.description: Automatically download the vision model on first use if it is not installed.

nyx.enableOcr.description: Run offline OCR (tesseract.js) on images in addition to the vision-model description.

nyx.autoTitle.description: Automatically name each chat with a short model-generated title after the first exchange.

nyx.autoFetchUrls.description: When your message contains http(s) URLs, automatically fetch each page (readable text plus described images) and add it to the agent's context.

nyx.memoryEnabled.description: Remember key outcomes of past sessions (per project) and make them available to new agent sessions.

nyx.memoryInject.description: How many recent memory entries to inject into a new session's system prompt. The agent can recall more via the recall_memory tool.

walkthroughs.title: Nyx — Local AI: Getting Started
walkthroughs.description: Where Nyx lives next to Cursor's own agent, how to switch between them, and how to hand work off in both directions.

steps.title: Nyx vs. Cursor's agent panel
steps.description:
Nyx is a separate, fully local agent — it is not Cursor's cloud agent. The header with its own accent line and the ✦ NYX wordmark marks the Nyx world.
Give Nyx its own space as a full editor tab, side by side with Cursor's agent.
[Open Nyx in Editor Tab](command:nyx.openInEditor)

steps.title: Find your local models
steps.description:
Nyx auto-detects Ollama and LM Studio on start. Add remote machines (a DGX box, a Mac Studio) via the ⚙ Manage models view.
[Refresh Local Models](command:nyx.refreshModels)

steps.title: Switch worlds with one key
steps.description:
Press `Ctrl+Alt+N` (`Cmd+Alt+N` on macOS) to jump into Nyx — and press it again inside Nyx to jump back to your editor.
[Try it now](command:nyx.toggleFocus)

steps.title: Hand work off in both directions
steps.description:
Send Nyx's local groundwork to Cursor with *Copy Chat as Markdown (Handoff)* — or copy a Cursor conversation and continue it locally.
[Import Handoff from Clipboard](command:nyx.importHandoff)
